nasb.text: And Rehoboam slept with his fathers and was buried with his fathers in the city of David; and his mother’s name was Naamah the Ammonitess. And Abijam his son became king in his place.

esv.text: And Rehoboam slept with his fathers and was buried with his fathers in the city of David. His mother’s name was Naamah the Ammonite. And Abijam his son reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 羅波安與他的列祖同睡，與他的列祖一同埋葬在大衛的城裡。他的母親名叫拿瑪，是亞捫人；他的兒子亞比央接續他作王。

ccb.text: 罗波安与祖先同眠后，葬在大卫城的祖坟里。他母亲是亚扪人拿玛。他儿子亚比央继位。
